ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* The year or range of the season (e.g., 2005–06) */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player statistics record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season where the statistics apply */,
  "players_used" INTEGER /* Total number of players used during the season */,
  "starting_players" INTEGER /* Number of starting players in the matches */,
  "subs_only" INTEGER /* Number of players who were used only as substitutes */,
  "total_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the players */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the players */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the players */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team (e.g., Forward, Goalkeeper) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team's coach */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the match was played */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of team A participating in the match */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of team B participating in the match */,
  "score_a" INTEGER /* Score of team A in the match */,
  "score_b" INTEGER /* Score of team B in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time when the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_b_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions granted to this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player match statistics record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match where the statistics apply */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who reported the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "expected_recovery_time" INTEGER /* Expected recovery time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the lineup (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substitutions" (
  "sub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substitution record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_in_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who came in */,
  "player_out_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who came out */,
  "sub_time" TEXT /* Time when the substitution occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substitutions_player_in_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_in_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substitutions_player_out_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_out_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substitutions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substitutions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id")
)
